case_title: PFLUGRADT, RICK VS HOLDER GARY DBA HOLDER/HALL, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,490.00 FILED BY PFLUGRADT, RICK AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDER GARY DBA HOLDER/HALL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO GARY HOLDER RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PFLUGRADT, RICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOLDER GARY DBA HOLDER/HALL, INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
